title: Cylindrolobus rhodobracteus
taxonomy: Cylindrolobus rhodobracteus belongs to the family Cylindrolobaceae, which is a group of fungi. It is classified as a species of fungus in the genus Cylindrolobus. The classification of Cylindrolobus rhodobracteus is further divided into the kingdom Fungi, phylum Ascomycota, and class Leotiomycetes. This classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the species. Further research is needed to confirm the accuracy of its classification within the fungal kingdom.
